channel.title: Joe Croney
channel.description: Notes on software, systems, and the things I build.

item.title: Building GreekPay
item.description: What started as a weekend spreadsheet-killer is now a production SaaS handling payments, banking, and an AI advisor for real fraternity chapters.

item.title: Writing a File System in C
item.description: Notes from building a Unix-like file system emulator with inodes and directories for CSC 357.
